name: jdy_batch_update_data
description_zh: 将多条记录的指定字段修改为同一值（最多100条/次，不支持子表单）
description: Batch update up to 100 records with the same field values. 'data_ids' is an array of record _ids to update. 'data' is the fields to update, same format as single update. Note: subform fields are NOT supported in batch update. Returns {success_count}. Rate limit: 30/s.

data_ids.description: 要修改的记录ID列表，最多100条

is_start_trigger.description: 是否触发智能助手（默认false）
